def positive_filter_then_count_then_iterate():
    rule_id = "filter_then_count_then_iterate"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "The same collection is traversed repeatedly for filtering, counting, and later iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
